nodes.label: AI Agents System
nodes.rationale: Gubbu employs AI Agents using the Gemini model to assist users.

nodes.label: Gemini Migration
nodes.rationale: The Gubbu project has been migrated from OpenAI to Google Gemini. Chat Model: gemini-2.0-flash, Embedding Model: text-embedding-004.

nodes.label: Travelpayouts Affiliate Integration
nodes.rationale: Integrated with Travelpayouts to automatically track affiliate commissions for hotel and flight bookings.

nodes.label: Web Speech API Voice Implementation
nodes.rationale: Uses the browser's built-in Web Speech API for voice interactions to avoid external service costs and enable offline functionality.

nodes.label: Voice Recognition Autocorrect
nodes.rationale: Since 'Gubbu' is an unknown word to speech recognition, it often hears 'Google' or 'goo boo'. An auto-correct function replaces these variations with 'Gubbu' before sending.

Polygonal Network Dog Design
nodes.rationale: A stylized dog or wolf head constructed from a glowing dark blue and cyan wireframe/network. Represents themes of AI, graph networks, and connectivity.

nodes.label: Network Dog Mascot
nodes.rationale: The image displays a dog's head in profile composed of glowing nodes and interconnecting lines, visually representing a neural network, constellation, or digital mesh. This suggests it serves as a technology, AI, or network-themed mascot.
